question: Does a causal three-hour PWV environmental history add information beyond radar for 0-2 h precipitation, especially in radar-observable weak-echo growth regimes?
role: representation gate before any new PWV fusion architecture

inputs.pwv_primary: three hours of 30-minute anchors aligned at or before the final observed radar time
inputs.pwv_short_comparator: existing nine-frame interpolated representation; diagnostic comparator only because interpolation may use a future native endpoint
inputs.causality: the primary PWV branch never reads an anchor later than the forecast issue time

frozen_radar.features: 1/8-resolution generative radar latent conditioned on deterministic evolution

probe.parameter_matching: radar-only, short-PWV, and causal-long-PWV probes instantiate the identical architecture and parameter count
probe.threshold_selection: fit and calibration days are disjoint inside the training split; thresholds are frozen before validation

strata.weak_echo_nondecreasing: last observed radar tile is at least 1 mm/h but below the task threshold and is not lower than the first-three-frame mean
strata.radar_quiet: observed radar-history tile maximum is below 1 mm/h; diagnostic only
strata.future_information: no stratum uses future radar or target values

controls.radar_only: matched probe with learned constant modality slot
controls.pwv_long_spatial_shift: same causal-long checkpoint with half-domain latent shift
controls.pwv_long_cross_event: same causal-long checkpoint with deterministic different-event PWV
controls.pwv_long_tendency_reversed: same causal-long checkpoint with only the tendency feature sign reversed

promotion_rule.required: causal-long PWV must improve CSI by at least 0.003 and average precision by more than zero over radar-only, short interpolated PWV, spatial shift, and cross-event PWV in at least three of four horizon-threshold tasks
promotion_rule.safety: causal-long PWV may not lose more than 0.003 all-window CSI against radar-only in any task
promotion_rule.note: A pass justifies a restricted preconditioning adapter; it is not final dense-forecast evidence.
